items.reviewerNotes: Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: Options reordered; French key A (The fuel level is already low) maps to master D (fuel in tank reached the minimum level). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order. Image/tags checked: source tags gas-pump yellow/gray; qid tags gas/gas-pump yellow/gray.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Scene ambiguous for overtaking (pedestrians/crosswalk, lane layout). Machine suggests q0255 (cannot overtake) but score/modality not decisive; insufficient discriminative evidence to approve or create.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: ROW unique detail matches: Does this traffic light at the intersection indicate crossing is prohibited?. True/false polarity is Wrong; French key B (No) maps to that polarity. Image/tags checked: source tags pov/intersection/traffic-light/blue-car blue/green/white; qid tags pov/purple car/lighthouse/car green/gray/purple.

Codex high-risk createNewQuestion: Red circular sign with black car + diagonal slash supports the source answer concept C ('tout type de véhicule' / motor vehicles prohibited), but source answer highlighting was not extracted. Rejected q0881 because its option rows expect sedan/all kinds/midsize bus/small truck and the master answer is sedan, not this French option set. Manual QC should verify the inferred key C.

Top hard-locked q0812 was not reused; selected qid has closer prompt/option-row semantics for this French item.
